name: Miami Fighters
short_description: Miami Fighters is a couch co-op brawler where strategy meets chaos. Team up or go free-for-all with friends, or throw bots into the mix, and cause absolute madness with up to 4 players!
detailed_description:
Unleash the chaos in Miami Fighters!

Miami Fighters is a couch co-op brawler where strategy meets chaos. Team up or go free-for-all with friends, or throw bots into the mix, and cause absolute madness with up to 4 players.

Choose from melee weapons, guns and ultra weapons. Pick some upgrades and immediately regret everything... or don't. Chaos usually wins anyway. And if you spot cat Nova, catch her fast! She might be tiny, but the boost is massive.

Run out of lives in Stock Mode and cry quietly or go full psycho in Time Mode and farm kills like your life depends on it.

Had fun? Broke a controller? Drop a review and let us know!

supported_languages: English, Dutch, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Serbian
